title: Implement execution-to-prd skill
description: Stamp src/template/.claude/skills/execution-to-prd/SKILL.md (single file) as an .excn-native fork of to-prd, and mirror into root .claude/skills/ (Src-First). It publishes .excn/prds/PRD-NNN-<slug>.json with prd.schema.json as the contract; no label vocabulary and no external-tracker setup dependency.
acceptance_criteria: src/template/.claude/skills/execution-to-prd/SKILL.md exists as a single file (no multi-doc set)
a run publishes .excn/prds/PRD-NNN-<slug>.json that validates against prd.schema.json
no label vocabulary and no external-tracker setup dependency
root .claude/skills/ mirror is byte-identical to src (Src-First)
notes: Re-scoped from 'Resolve to-prd: JSON publish target, no labels' for sprint 2 under PRD-005; fork direction ruled by Brooks 2026-06-07. Shipped 2026-06-07 by team-lead (sprint_2 item S2-3): execution-to-prd fork publishes schema-valid JSON PRDs to .excn/prds/PRD-<NNN>-<slug>.json, prd.schema.json sole authority, no markdown template/labels/tracker; alignment PASS; src+root mirrored.
